title: Reasons to Add Eversource Energy (ES) to Your Portfolio Now
text: Eversource Energy's (ES) positive estimates movement, inorganic growth and capital investments to strengthen infrastructure make it a strong investment pick.

title: Williams Announces Multi-Year MSA Contract with Eversource
text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Williams Industrial Services Group Inc. (NYSE American: WLMS) (“Williams” or the “Company”), an energy and industrial infrastructure services company, today announced that it has entered into a Master Service Agreement (“MSA”) with Eversource Energy (NYSE: ES), a major New England utility based in Hartford, CT effective September 16, 2022. The MSA covers natural gas pipeline services in Connecticut and other locations, as may be agreed upon, over a period of three year

title: Eversource Energy Announces Jim Judge Will Retire as Executive Chairman of the Board
text: HARTFORD, Conn. & BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Jim Judge is retiring as executive chairman of the Board of Trustees of Eversource Energy, to be succeeded by Joe Nolan, President and CEO.
